accessibility.text: This presentation was first sketched with Claude (Anthropic), model Sonnet 4.6, accessed via a paid subscription.
The speaker outlined the ideas verbally — over coffee — drawing on prior discussions with the event organizers.
The LLM ordered the argument and generated this slide template using Canva.
The speaker then built the final slides manually, refining the wording throughout.
That process was, itself, part of what this talk is about.
